title: Better Boat
description: Make all boats fancy and item accurate
body:
![boat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6727f1292610dbc7994a5774ec0daa50d85b745.jpeg)**_OPTIFINE or ETF+EMF REQUIRED_**

This pack makes boats more accurate with a bow at the front of the boat, adds seat for a better look

and changes the paddles to boat items with a respective wood color and not shovels instead of paddles.

**Enjoy! ;)**

_Official Upload on Modrinth the previous was a guy who doesnt ask permission to upload my work (and no just crediting with no permission is not allowed)_
